title: Aarhus, Central Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aarhus, Central Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aarhus is a city in Central Jutland with a population of 280,000. Denmark’s second city and cultural hub, known for its ARoS art museum, Viking history, and vibrant food scene.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
